_notes.purpose: Institutional books for the agent-builder Workspace surface. Real public issuers that resolve in Elemental so an enterprise evaluator sees themselves (and their counterparties) in the graph. Every score traces to Elemental source — nothing is hand-authored.
_notes.ownerUserId: Institutional books use the __institutional__ sentinel so they never appear in the retail per-user bucket lists; the Workspace surface selects them explicitly.

books.name: Credit Committee — Diligence Pipeline
books.description: Counterparties under enhanced due diligence ahead of refinancing and investment-committee review. Real public issuers, resolved and scored from Elemental.

mandate.question: What is the complete risk picture for each counterparty under review?
mandate.context: A monitoring agent watches the book; when an issuer's risk profile shifts, an analytic agent runs the EDD module combination and a composition agent assembles an evidence-backed diligence brief.
